metadata.description: Lightweight BI for Claude. Local-first natural-language SQL on your own database — no infra, no servers, no data leaves your machine.

plugins.name: agami
plugins.description: Connect a database, ask questions in natural language, save corrections, render charts. Runs entirely on your machine via Claude's Bash / Read / Write tools — no MCP server or Python required if you have psql/mysql or DuckDB (an optional local MCP server is available for use from Claude Desktop).
